title: BG College of Vocational Education and Training Pty Ltd (trading as Safeguard School of Trades) — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: The Australian Skills Quality Authority cancelled qualifications issued by BG College of Vocational Education and Training Pty Ltd (RTO 45850), trading as Safeguard School of Trades, effective 2 December 2025, as part of its qualification-integrity regulatory action program. The cancellation covers Property Services Training Package qualifications issued between 24 March 2023 and 2 December 2025, and Construction/Plumbing/Services qualifications issued between 2 May 2024 and 2 December 2025.
scope: Qualifications it issued were cancelled by the national vocational education regulator under its qualification-integrity enforcement program; Cancellation covers qualifications issued across an approximately two-year window
